title: Administrative rules
doc_html:
§392.13. Administrative rules

            The State Board of Elementary and Secondary Education shall promulgate rules to implement the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.

            Acts 2023, No. 266, §1.
doc_text:
§392.13.  Administrative rules
The State Board of Elementary and Secondary Education shall promulgate rules to
implement the provisions of this Part in accordance with the Administrative Procedure Act.
Acts 2023, No. 266, §1.
